# Senior Backend Engineer - Platform Team

**Location:** Remote (EU) · **Type:** Full-time

## About the role

We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to help scale Certalytic's interview-integrity platform. You will design and operate high-throughput screening pipelines, own critical API surfaces, and mentor engineers on reliability and security-first delivery.

## Required qualifications

- **5+ years** professional backend development experience
- **Strong proficiency in Go (Golang)** - production services, concurrency patterns, profiling, and idiomatic module design
- Experience building **distributed systems** (queues, idempotent workers, at-least-once processing)
- Solid **PostgreSQL** schema design, query tuning, and migration discipline
- Comfort with **Docker**, CI/CD, and observability (metrics, structured logging, tracing)
- Excellent written communication and ability to explain trade-offs to product and legal stakeholders

## Nice to have

- Laravel or PHP experience in a prior role
- Experience with EU data residency and GDPR-conscious architecture
- Prior work on document ingestion or ML-adjacent pipelines

## What you'll do

- Build and maintain Go microservices that orchestrate OCR and LLM screening jobs
- Partner with platform engineering on Hetzner EU deployment topology
- Review peer code with a bias toward clarity, test coverage, and operational safety
- Participate in on-call rotation for production queue and API health

## Interview process

1. **Round 1 - Get to know & behavioral** (45 min): motivation, collaboration, past ownership stories
2. **Round 2 - Technical deep dive** (60 min): Go architecture, debugging, system design, live coding discussion

We evaluate for authentic, independent ability - not rehearsed talking points.
